can be carried out by unskilled persons do not constitute skilled physical therapy. 

However, if the criteria in §40.2.1(d)(3) are met, where there is clear documentation that, 
because of special medical complications (e.g., susceptible to pathological bone 
fractures), the skills of a therapist are needed
